extract: Bulldoze (Japanese: じならし Ground Levelling) is a damage-dealing Ground-type move introduced in Generation V. It is: TM78 from Generation V to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM81 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM83 in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM028 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM078 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
